SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant, William Castaneda, the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Abraham Panossian, Serouge Panossian, and Odette Panossian the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Plaintiff/Respondent, Serouge Panossian testified on behalf of himself.
Defendant/Appellant, William Castaneda testified on behalf of himself

Appellant, Defendant William Castaneda testifies on his behalf. The following evidence is submitted:
None

Respondent, Plaintiff Abraham Panossian testifies on his own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:

#1: 12-page rental lease agreement
#2: 3-page tenant ledger
#3: 4-page copies of checks from Castaneda to Panossian

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Braden C. Woods; Clerk: Dennis D. Vegas; Not Reported. (D608)
